reportedIssues: Navigation tab text 'Hot Gam' is truncated, should display as 'Hot Games'
Game carousel items overflow their containers, showing partial/cut-off game cards on the right edge of both 'BetRivers Exclusive Games' and 'Top Played New Games' sections

expected.reasoning: No reported issue describes a negative jackpot value; all reported issues concern UI layout and text truncation problems.
